prompt: Build a Flask REST API with endpoints for managing a list of tasks. I need GET /api/tasks to list all tasks, POST /api/tasks to create a new task, and DELETE /api/tasks/<id> to delete a task. Store tasks in memory (no database needed). Run it in a sandbox.

assertions.name: get_tasks_endpoint
assertions.description: GET /api/tasks returns a JSON list of tasks

assertions.name: post_tasks_endpoint
assertions.description: POST /api/tasks creates a new task and returns 201

assertions.name: delete_tasks_endpoint
assertions.description: DELETE /api/tasks/<id> removes a task and returns 204

assertions.name: json_handling
assertions.description: The API handles JSON request bodies correctly

assertions.name: sandbox_running
assertions.description: The app is running in a sandbox with a public URL
